title: cocculus orbiculatus f. macrophyllus
intro: Cocculus orbiculatus f. macrophyllus, also known as the Chinese parasol, is a plant species within the Cocculus orbiculatus plant family, characterized by its unique and distinctive features. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Cocculus orbiculatus f. macrophyllus include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve sleep quality. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
